title: Modulus Core
description: The core mod for Chappie's mods
body:
# The core mod for my mods

Modulus is a universal core for Minecraft that adds a new system of superpowers, animations and events to the game, increasing the interactivity and dynamics of the gameplay. The core is suitable for use in mods as well as for creating your own mechanics with superpowers.

[![discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865f2?logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/7wfMzDQ)

- [The Boys](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-boys-mod)
